text: It is, genuinely, a remarkable find. An abandoned greenhouse on the edge of the school grounds — glass ceiling, most panes intact, floor of bare earth, old irrigation channels forming natural concentric rings around a central clear space. It looks like it was built for a Scathagram.

speaker: Dirtus
text: The rings. The earth floor. The glass ceiling so the moon comes directly through. It's perfect.

speaker: Grubwin
text: This is actually incredible. I hate that it's incredible.

speaker: Dirtus
text: I asked the groundskeeper. He said it hasn't been used in fifteen years. He said we could use it for club activities if we didn't break anything.

speaker: Dirtus
text: I prepared a brief presentation. Only four slides this time.

speaker: Mawla
text: He said yes to four slides.

speaker: Dirtus
text: He seemed interested in the worm aspect. He's a groundskeeper. There was natural connection.
You stand in the center of the concentric earth rings. The light comes through the glass in long late-afternoon beams. It is, genuinely, perfect.
Next week: the Full Convergence Event.
